VLINCS no-anchor iteration

Scheduler Combo5 After Seq6257 P005 Gain

After the seq6257 best, a direct-score reviewer tested 10 more local repair candidates and promoted a five-candidate combo: SigLIP ranks 18, 6, 9, 2 plus weak rank12. Canonical p005_area IDF1 improves from 0.669019 to 0.669311.

Metric
0.669311
canonical p005_area IDF1
Delta
0.000292
vs baseline 0.669019
Pipeline module

M7/M10 + M8 + M12

A no-anchor scheduler/reviewer keeps direct-positive local repairs after seq6257, composes non-overlapping islands, then M12 validates density_simple plus p005_area delivery.

Used in pipelineyes: root ./demo.sh now defaults to this DS1 method reproduction
No-anchor statusTrue
Method flow

How the run was produced

StepModuleInputActionOutput
1M8 base reproductionvisual-subcluster base assignmentreproduce feature-outlier, fresh-subpart, local-gated combo, and seq6257 stagesseq6257 assignment sha 5359c867...
2M7/M10 reviewerseq6257 assignment + weakmetric/DINO/SigLIP manifestsdirect-score 10 diverse remaining local repairs3 strong positives, 2 tiny positives, ties/negatives recorded
3M8 combo resolutionnon-overlapping positive/tiny-positive repairscompose SigLIP r18/r6/r9/r2 plus weak r12 after seq6257combo5 assignment sha a569b4f7...
4M12 deliverycombo5 assignmentexport fresh submission zip, run density_simple, then p005_area with config/drop checkscanonical p005_area IDF1 0.669311
Implementation

What changed

The implementation does not train on anchors or GT identities. It rebuilds the prior no-anchor best from committed feature evidence, reruns weakmetric/SigLIP local-gated candidate generation, materializes five non-overlapping scheduler repairs after seq6257, exports a fresh submission zip, and validates direct, density_simple, and p005_area. GT is used only by the evaluator after materialization. The generated-positive lesson here is scheduler/admission: keep only local feature positives that survive full-score reviewer/opponent gates; image API positives remain future work and must use environment-variable credentials plus CTF.

  • kit/compose_no_anchor_cross_manifest_repairs.py
  • kit/propose_no_anchor_subpart_repair_candidates.py
  • kit/evaluate_sample_assignments_full.py
  • kit/no_anchor_pervideo_filter_selector.py
  • kit/evaluate_submission_detection_filter.py
  • kit/export_no_anchor_subpart_visual_case.py
  • reports/vlincs_iterations/20260624_scheduler_combo5_after_seq6257_p005_gain/reproduce.sh
  • demo.sh

Visual cases

Failure mode and fix

9 component cases, 11 tracklet/frame examples, 9 embedded images. Embedded images remove the local file:// path dependency when this deck is opened from the browser or copied to Bitbucket.

Combo5 SigLIP rank18: seq2344/2390/2549

Three component-51 tracklets move to component 29; this was the strongest individual direct-positive candidate.

Raw-frame status: unavailable_coordinate_fallback

Previous failure

The old graph kept a small component-51 island split from a component-29 identity despite local SigLIP evidence.

New behavior

Move only the three island tracklets and keep the repair only inside a direct-positive and p005-positive combo.

Next auto-research action

Reviewer/Opponent update

Use combo5 positives as scheduler labels and keep the killed/tie direct candidates as hard negatives. Next useful step is a learned reviewer over local-gated candidates; image-generated positives should only enter after env-key API calls plus DINO/SigLIP/weakmetric CTF, never plaintext-key commands.
